extract_fields.field_extraction_description: Full name only. No email, no title.
Exact email address as written. null if not found.
Exact phone number as written. null if not found.

If stated explicitly (e.g. "5 years of experience"), use that number. If not stated, calculate from work history dates: Add up durations of all UNIQUE, non-overlapping roles only. If two roles overlap in time, count that period ONCE. Use 2025 as the current year if a role says "Present" or "Current". A student internship of 3 months = 0.25 years. Round to 1 decimal place. If no dates at all, return null. Do NOT guess.

Return a flat list of specific technical skills only (languages, frameworks, tools, platforms). Do NOT include soft skills like "communication" or "leadership". Deduplicate. Normalise capitalisation (e.g. "javascript" -> "JavaScript").
Most recent job title only, exactly as written on the resume. Do not paraphrase or generalise.

Format as: "Degree, Institution (Graduation Year)". Graduation year = the END year of the degree, not the start year. Example: "2022 - 2026" means graduation year is 2026. If multiple degrees, return the highest qualification.
Return a list of objects: [{"company": ..., "role": ..., "duration": ..., "technologies": [...]}]. technologies = list of tools/languages mentioned for that role.
Return a list of objects: [{"name": ..., "technologies": [...]}]. technologies = list of tools/languages mentioned for that project.
One string summarising notable achievements, hackathons, publications, or awards. null if none.
